C

containsAnyNonPrime(int[]) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PrimeCheckerSequent
Checks an array of numbers for non-prime numbers sequentially.
containsAnyNonPrime(int[]) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PrimeParallelStreamChecker
Checks an array of numbers for non-prime numbers using parallel stream.
containsAnyNonPrime(int[], int) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PrimeCheckerThread
Checks an array of numbers for non-prime numbers using multithreading.

P

PrimeCheckerSequent - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Class for checking an array of numbers for non-prime numbers sequentially.
PrimeCheckerSequent() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PrimeCheckerSequent
 
PrimeCheckerThread - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Class for checking if an array of integers contains any non-prime number using parallel threads.
PrimeCheckerThread() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PrimeCheckerThread
 
PrimeCheckerThread.Worker - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Worker class that represents a single thread for prime checking.
PrimeParallelStreamChecker - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Class for checking an array of numbers for non-prime numbers using parallel stream.
